questions: when will humans go to mars
answers: Current Mars presence: NASA's Perseverance rover and Ingenuity helicopter, Curiosity rover (since 2012).
Human mission: SpaceX targeting 2030s, NASA planning late 2030s-2040s. Challenges: 7-month journey, radiation, and landing.
Life on Mars: no confirmed life yet, but Perseverance is collecting samples for return to Earth. Evidence of ancient water exists.
Mars facts: 1 year = 687 Earth days, gravity is 38% of Earth, thin CO2 atmosphere, temperature -60°C average.
